update.code: let run=async(e,i,{setting:l})=>{(r=Object.values(global.db.users).filter(e=>e.limit<l.limit.free&&!e.premium)).forEach(e=>{e.limit=l.limit.free});var t=Object.values(global.db.users).filter(e=>e.premium),r=(t.forEach(e=>{e.limit=l.limit.premium}),r.length+t.length);e.reply(`✓ Sukses mereset limit untuk *${r}* pengguna!`)};export default{run:run,cmd:\"resetlimit\",type:\"developer\",devs:!0,location:\"plugins/developer/resetlimit.js\"};
